description: Request body for `remember`. Authority is always `agent_inference` — humans use Django admin.

content.description: Prose to write. Read verbatim into future prompts.

key.description: Agent-chosen semantic key. Re-using a key updates the existing entry in place.

run_id.description: Run that authored this memory; persisted as `created_by_run_id` for lineage. Must reference a run on this same project — cross-project run UUIDs are rejected.

tags.description: Tags for later search. Empty/whitespace tags are dropped.
